label: namecode - METEOR | 47.307
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Saturn's Iapetus: Painted Moon. What has happened to Saturn's moon Iapetus?  Vast sections of this strange world are dark as coal, while others are as bright as snow.  To help better understand this unusually tinted moon, in 2007 Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
